# Launch Alpha — GTM Email Draft and Comms Notes

CONFIDENTIAL: Launch pricing not finalized

**Author:** Sam Okafor, GTM Manager
**Last Updated:** April 24, 2026

## Launch Email Status
Draft is complete and has been reviewed internally. Pending legal sign-off before scheduling.

### Draft Subject Line
"Introducing Checkout AI Assistant — Your Customers Just Got a Smarter Checkout"

### Target Send Time
Monday, April 28 — 9:30 AM PT (30 minutes after go-live)

### Audience
- Beta program participants (47 storefronts)
- Sales pipeline prospects who requested early access (112 contacts)

## Pricing Notes
CONFIDENTIAL: Launch pricing not finalized. Do not include pricing details in any external communication until legal confirms the final pricing structure. Current draft email contains a placeholder — do not send until replaced.

## Sales Enablement
- One-pager: draft complete, pending design polish
- Demo video: 90-second screen capture — complete
- Objection handling doc: in progress

## Dependencies Before Send
- [ ] Legal pricing approval
- [ ] Engineering confirms go-live (NOVA-142 resolved + QA signed off)
- [ ] Placeholder pricing replaced with final numbers

## Notes
Do not circulate this document outside the GTM and Product teams.
